chunks.title: Ahithophel's First Counsel
chunks.reason: Ahithophel proposes a night attack on David to Absalom and the elders.

chunks.title: Hushai's Counter-Counsel
chunks.reason: Absalom consults Hushai who offers a different strategy that is accepted.

chunks.title: The Message to David and Ahithophel's Death
chunks.reason: Hushai warns David via spies while Ahithophel commits suicide.

chunks.title: David and Absalom Camp in Gilead
chunks.reason: Both armies cross the Jordan and set up camp in Gilead.

chunks.title: Provisions from Mahanaim
chunks.reason: Three men bring a detailed list of food and supplies to David.
